report_date.description: Report or collection date as printed

immunohistochemistry_markers.description: One entry per immunohistochemistry marker result in the report

marker.description: Marker name, e.g. CD20, CD3, Ki-67, BCL2

result.description: Result exactly as printed: positive / negative / a percentage / a score

ki67_percent.description: Ki-67 / MIB-1 proliferation index as a percentage, if stated
